message:
✨ Dashboard excellence: modals, bug fixes, and GA4 instrumentation (#2168)

* ✨ Dashboard excellence: modals, bug fixes, and GA4 instrumentation

Add drill-down detail modals across Compliance, Insights, and Deploy dashboards
with AI Mission integration and full GA4 event instrumentation.

Bug fixes:
- Fix Kyverno violations always showing 0 by back-populating from PolicyReport results
- Fix HelmHistory config contradiction (isDemoData:false + isLive:false)

New modals (6):
- InsightDetailModal with Overview/Evidence/Remediation tabs for all 7 insight cards
- ComplianceScoreBreakdownModal with per-tool breakdown (Kubescape/Kyverno)
- PolicyViolationDetailModal with "Fix with AI Mission" action
- GitOpsDriftDetailModal with resource details and "Sync with AI Mission"
- HelmHistoryDetailModal with revision details and "Rollback with AI Mission"

New hooks:
- useInsightActions for localStorage/sessionStorage acknowledge/dismiss persistence

GA4 events (7 new emit functions):
- ksc_modal_opened, ksc_modal_tab_viewed, ksc_modal_closed
- ksc_insight_acknowledged, ksc_insight_dismissed
- ksc_action_clicked, ksc_ai_suggestion_viewed

Visual polish:
- Consistent hover states with ChevronRight icons across all card rows
- All action buttons route through useMissions() for safe AI-assisted remediation

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix review issues: a11y, error handling, type safety, and edge cases

- Add role="button", tabIndex, onKeyDown to 6 clickable insight divs
- Add console.warn logging to silent catch blocks in useInsightActions
- Guard violation.clusters with (arr || []) for undefined safety
- Reset openTimeRef.current = 0 after close in all 5 modals
- Add ToolDataUnavailable fallback for missing Kubescape/Kyverno data
- Show "No policies configured" instead of 100% for 0-policy Kyverno
- Extract IIFE to useMemo in ComplianceCards kyvernoBreakdownData
- Tighten Record types with union keys in GitOpsDriftDetailModal
- Fix stale comment in ComplianceCards (violations no longer always 0)
- Update JSDoc to match actual modal content

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

openTimeRef.current) + openTimeRef.current = 0 + } + onClose() + }, [onClose]) + + const handleSyncWithAI = useCallback(() => { + if (!drift) return + emitActionClicked('sync', 'gitops_drift', 'deploy') + startMission({ + title: `Sync: ${drift.resource} drift`, + description: `${drift.driftType} drift on ${drift.kind}/${drift.resource} in ${drift.namespace} on ${drift.cluster}`, + type: 'repair', + cluster: drift.cluster, + initialPrompt: `GitOps drift detected on ${drift.kind}/${drift.resource} in namespace ${drift.namespace} on cluster ${drift.cluster}. + +Drift type: ${drift.driftType} +Severity: ${drift.severity} +Git version: ${drift.gitVersion} +${drift.details ? `Details: ${drift.details}` : ''} + +Help me sync this resource back to the desired state: +1. @@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+/**
+ * Hook for managing insight acknowledgement and dismissal state.
+ *
+ * - Acknowledged insights persist in localStorage across sessions
+ * - Dismissed insights persist only in sessionStorage (current session)
+ */
+
+import { useState, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
+
+/** localStorage key for acknowledged insight IDs */
+const INSIGHT_ACKNOWLEDGE_KEY = 'acknowledged-insights'
+/** sessionStorage key for dismissed insight IDs (session only) */
+const INSIGHT_DISMISS_KEY = 'dismissed-insights-session'
+
+function loadSet(storage: Storage, key: string): Set<string> {
+  try {
+    const raw = storage.getItem(key)
+    if (!raw) return new Set()
+    const parsed: unknown = JSON.parse(raw)
+    if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) {
+      console.warn(`[useInsightActions] Invalid data in ${key}: expected array, got ${typeof parsed}`)
+      return new Set()
+    }
+    return new Set(parsed.filter((v): v is string => typeof v === 'string'))
+  } catch (err) {
+    console.warn(`[useInsightActions] Failed to load ${key} from storage:`, err)
+    return new Set()
+  }
+}
+
+function saveSet(storage: Storage, key: string, set: Set<string>): void {
+  try {
+    storage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(Array.from(set)))
+  } catch (err) {
+    console.warn(`[useInsightActions] Failed to save ${key} to storage:`, err)
+  }
+}
+
+export function useInsightActions() {
+  const [acknowledgedIds, setAcknowledgedIds] = useState<Set<string>>(
+    () => loadSet(localStorage, INSIGHT_ACKNOWLEDGE_KEY)
+  )
+  const [dismissedIds, setDismissedIds] = useState<Set<string>>(
+    () => loadSet(sessionStorage, INSIGHT_DISMISS_KEY)
+  )
+
+  const acknowledgeInsight = useCallback((id: string) => {
+    setAcknowledgedIds(prev => {
+      const next = new Set(prev)
+      next.add(id)
+      saveSet(localStorage, INSIGHT_ACKNOWLEDGE_KEY, next)
+      return next
+    })
+  }, [])
+
+  const dismissInsight = useCallback((id: string) => {
+    setDismissedIds(prev => {
+      const next = new Set(prev)
+      next.add(id)
+      saveSet(sessionStorage, INSIGHT_DISMISS_KEY, next)
+      return next
+    })
+  }, [])
+
+  const isAcknowledged = useCallback((id: string) => acknowledgedIds.has(id), [acknowledgedIds])
+  const isDismissed = useCallback((id: string) => dismissedIds.has(id), [dismissedIds])
+
+  const acknowledgedCount = useMemo(() => acknowledgedIds.size, [acknowledgedIds])
+
+  return {
+    acknowledgeInsight,
+    dismissInsight,
+    isAcknowledged,
+    isDismissed,
+    acknowledgedCount,
+  }
+}
